# Omuz Serisi — Derleme (2026-04-05)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### The Relationship between early and late stimulation of the deltoid muscle in patients undergoing reverse total shoulder arthroplasty. A systematic review with meta-analysis.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik the relationship between early and late stimulation of the deltoid muscle in patients undergoing reverse total omuz arthroplasty. a sistematik derleme with meta-analiz. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of bodywork and movement therapies. 2026 jun. Anahtar kavramlar: relationship, between, early, late, stimulation, deltoid.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41927206/

### Examination of Work Performance of Patients With Rheumatoid Arthritis.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik examination of work performance of patients with rheumatoid arthritis. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of occupational and environmental medicine. 2026 apr 2. Anahtar kavramlar: examination, work, performance, patients, rheumatoid, arthritis.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41925621/

### Effects of exercise-induced hypoalgesia on pressure pain threshold in patients with chronic musculoskeletal pain: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik effects of egzersiz-induced hypoalgesia on pressure ağrı threshold in patients with chronic musculoskeletal ağrı: a sistematik derleme and meta-analiz. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: pm & r : the journal of injury, fonksiyon, and rehabilitasyon. 2026 apr 2. Anahtar kavramlar: ağrı, effects, egzersiz, induced, hypoalgesia, pressure.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41925114/

### Construction elements and preliminary framework of a sport-medicine-education collaborative intervention model for patellar tendinopathy.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik construction elements and preliminary framework of a sport-medicine-education collaborative intervention model for patellar tendinopathy. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: frontiers in public health. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: construction, elements, preliminary, framework, sport, medicine.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41923772/

### Effectiveness of combined physical therapy and kinesio tape for acute hemiplegic shoulder pain: a retrospective study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik effectiveness of combined fizik tedavi / fizyoterapi and kinesio tape for acute hemiplegic omuz ağrı: a retrospective study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: neurological sciences : official journal of the italian neurological society and of the italian society of clinical neurophysiology. 2026 apr 2. Anahtar kavramlar: neurological, italian, society, effectiveness, combined, physical.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41922839/

### Efficacy of radiofrequency microdebridement (TOPAZ) in tendinopathy: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomised clinical trials.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik efficacy of radiofrequency microdebridement (topaz) in tendinopathy: a sistematik derleme and meta-analiz of randomised clinical klinik çalışmas. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of orthopaedic surgery and research. 2026 mar 31. Anahtar kavramlar: efficacy, radiofrequency, microdebridement, topaz, tendinopathy, systematic.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41918131/

### Effects of different frequencies of percussion massage therapy on pain, range of motion, functionality, joint position sense, and quality of life in individuals with rotator cuff tears: a randomized controlled trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik effects of different frequencies of percussion massage therapy on ağrı, range of motion, fonksiyonality, joint position sense, and quality of life in individuals with rotator manşet tears: a randomize controlled klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: bmc sports science, medicine & rehabilitasyon. 2026 apr 1. Anahtar kavramlar: effects, different, frequencies, percussion, massage, therapy.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41918014/

### Telemedicine for rotator cuff syndrome: Asynchronous exercise and remote follow-up in a randomized controlled study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik telemedicine for rotator manşet syndrome: asynchronous egzersiz and remote follow-up in a randomize controlled study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: plos one. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: telemedicine, rotator, cuff, syndrome, asynchronous, egzersiz.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41915711/
